meeting.title: API Transcript Storage Test
meeting.transcript:
using
this Apex General Assistant for the testing here what I am doing I am creating an API key from the mid-week and I am doing a Python code where it will get the meeting ID and from the meeting ID we are getting the transcripts and from the raw transcripts itself i am storing in the db like mango db or
else posters based on the requirement i will be storing there and after that one if it's needed whenever the person needs a engine to connect to the database based on the particular ID, then it will be converting into a summary or paint paint extractor.
This is what I am trying to do now.
And I am testing here completely meet Apex model meet assistant so that I can get the raw data.
For now, for testing itself, I am using SQLite DB.
After that, if everything works, then I will be moving all the data to the MongoDB.
Thank you.
